tier: Tier 7.7a - v2.5 Standardized Benchmark / Usefulness Scoreboard Contract
claim: Tier 7.7a locks the v2.5 public/standardized benchmark contract before scoring: Mackey-Glass, Lorenz, and NARMA10 at 8000 steps with seeds 42/43/44 form the primary scoreboard, while C-MAPSS FD001 and NAB are secondary public/real-ish confirmation tracks only.
caveat: Contract/pre-registration evidence only; not a benchmark score, not public usefulness proof, not a new baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, and not language, broad planning, AGI, or ASI evidence.
